title.zh: 中国储能电池系统进入埃及：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國儲能電池系統進入埃及：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China battery energy storage system documentation against Egypt EOS / GOEIC import conformity, IEC battery and energy-storage standards, UN 38.3 transport, EgyptERA grid-connection, fire-safety, and EMC expectations.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国储能电池系统文件与埃及EOS/GOEIC进口符合性、IEC电池及储能标准、UN 38.3运输、EgyptERA并网、消防安全及EMC要求差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國儲能電池系統文件與埃及EOS/GOEIC進口符合性、IEC電池及儲能標準、UN 38.3運輸、EgyptERA併網、消防安全及EMC要求差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, EOS scope determination, GOEIC customs or conformity decision, EgyptERA grid-connection approval, fire-safety approval, dangerous-goods classification, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, designers, and installers should verify current Egypt EOS, GOEIC, EgyptERA, customs, transport, fire, EMC, utility, and project requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、EOS适用范围裁定、GOEIC海关或符合性决定、EgyptERA并网批准、消防安全批准、危险货物分类或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、设计方和安装方在出货或安装前，应与合格专业人士核实现行埃及EOS、GOEIC、EgyptERA、海关、运输、消防、EMC、公用事业及项目要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、EOS適用範圍裁定、GOEIC海關或符合性決定、EgyptERA併網批准、消防安全批准、危險貨物分類或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、設計方和安裝方在出貨或安裝前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行埃及EOS、GOEIC、EgyptERA、海關、運輸、消防、EMC、公用事業及項目要求。

answer_first.en: For BESS exported from China to Egypt, no blanket whole-unit mandatory BESS certification has been confirmed from the cited public sources. The practical compliance file should instead be split by route: GOEIC / EOS import conformity for electric batteries or listed components where applicable, IEC 62619 and IEC 62933 evidence where requested by customers or authorities, UN 38.3 transport documentation, EgyptERA grid-connection review, and project-specific fire-safety and EMC evidence.
answer_first.zh: 中国BESS出口埃及时，依据已引用公开来源尚未确认存在覆盖整机BESS的统一强制认证。实务合规资料宜按路径拆分：适用时满足电池或列明部件的GOEIC/EOS进口符合性要求；按客户或主管机关要求提供IEC 62619和IEC 62933证据；提供UN 38.3运输文件；处理EgyptERA并网审查；并准备项目特定消防安全和EMC证据。
answer_first.zht: 中國BESS出口埃及時，依據已引用公開來源尚未確認存在覆蓋整機BESS的統一強制認證。實務合規資料宜按路徑拆分：適用時滿足電池或列明部件的GOEIC/EOS進口符合性要求；按客戶或主管機關要求提供IEC 62619和IEC 62933證據；提供UN 38.3運輸文件；處理EgyptERA併網審查；並準備項目特定消防安全和EMC證據。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, fire authority, grid operator, customs, dangerous-goods authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
